    • findUsersWithScoreByAnswerDate

      public List<Map<String,Object>> findUsersWithScoreByAnswerDate(String date)
      Find users with their progress/scores who answered questions on a specific date. Groups by user and chapter to get distinct user-chapter combinations.
      Parameters:
      date - The date to search for (format: YYYY-MM-DD)
      Returns:
      List of user answer data with score information
